code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut have_prev = false
    mut prev = 0
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    while i < tokens.len()
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(n)
          if not have_prev or n != prev
            if first
              result = "#{n}"
              first = false
            else
              result = "#{result} #{n}"
            end
            prev = n
            have_prev = true
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
